pictures.title: 埃及卡纳克神庙
pictures.summary: 卢克索卡纳克神庙多柱大厅，一百三十四根巨柱如石林耸立，最高柱...
pictures.full_text: 卢克索卡纳克神庙多柱大厅，一百三十四根巨柱如石林耸立，最高柱达二十三米，柱身满布浮雕彩绘，阳光从天窗洒入如神之光，为古埃及最宏伟的建筑空间。
pictures.full_text_en: The Hypostyle Hall of Karnak Temple at Luxor, with 134 massive columns rising like a stone forest. The tallest columns reach 23 meters, their surfaces covered with reliefs and paintings. Sunlight pours through clerestory windows like divine light—the most magnificent architectural space of ancient Egypt.

pictures.title: 埃及阿布辛贝神庙
pictures.summary: 拉美西斯二世在尼罗河畔岩壁中凿出神庙，四尊二十米高法老坐像守...
pictures.full_text: 拉美西斯二世在尼罗河畔岩壁中凿出神庙，四尊二十米高法老坐像守卫入口，每年二月与十月阳光直射内殿照亮法老面容，以天文精度彰显王权神威。
pictures.full_text_en: The Karnak Temple at Luxor, Egypt, was expanded over two thousand years. In the Hypostyle Hall, 134 massive columns tower like a stone forest. Papyrus-shaped capitals bloom like a primordial forest, obelisks bear hieroglyphs recording pharaohs' achievements. Karnak is ancient Egypt's largest temple complex, the ultimate expression of a dwelling place for the gods.

pictures.title: 乌尔塔庙
pictures.summary: 伊拉克乌尔城苏美尔塔庙，层层递减的台阶如通天之梯，基底六十四...
pictures.full_text: 伊拉克乌尔城苏美尔塔庙，层层递减的台阶如通天之梯，基底六十四米见方高三十米，为两河流域最早的神庙建筑形式，象征人神之间的垂直通道。
pictures.full_text_en: The Sumerian ziggurat at Ur in Iraq, with progressively receding steps like a ladder to heaven. Its base measures 64 meters square and rises 30 meters high—the earliest temple architectural form in Mesopotamia, symbolizing the vertical channel between humans and gods.

pictures.title: 波斯波利斯宫殿
pictures.summary: 波斯帝国大流士一世建仪典宫殿，万国门人首牛身柱如帝国威仪，百...
pictures.full_text: 波斯帝国大流士一世建仪典宫殿，万国门人首牛身柱如帝国威仪，百柱殿如石林列阵，浮雕描绘各国使臣朝贡如帝国编年史，为古代世界最壮观的仪典建筑。
pictures.full_text_en: The Imam Mosque in Isfahan, Iran, is covered in blue glazed tiles on its dome and walls, with geometric patterns extending infinitely like a kaleidoscope. The entrance portal is angled 45 degrees from the main axis to face Mecca. Its acoustic design allows echoes to reverberate beneath the dome—the most splendid chapter of Safavid Persian architecture.

pictures.title: 希腊伊瑞克提翁神庙
pictures.summary: 雅典卫城伊瑞克提翁神庙，六尊少女柱如石化的卡里亚提德支撑门廊...
pictures.full_text: 雅典卫城伊瑞克提翁神庙，六尊少女柱如石化的卡里亚提德支撑门廊，爱奥尼柱式纤细优雅与帕特农的雄健对比，为古典建筑最柔美的篇章。
pictures.full_text_en: The Erechtheion on the Athenian Acropolis, with six maiden columns—petrified Caryatids—supporting the porch. The slender elegance of the Ionic order contrasts with the robustness of the Parthenon, the most graceful chapter of classical architecture.

pictures.title: 罗马斗兽场
pictures.summary: 罗马斗兽场椭圆形四层拱券如巨环，可容五万观众，底层多立克二层...
pictures.full_text: 罗马斗兽场椭圆形四层拱券如巨环，可容五万观众，底层多立克二层爱奥尼三层科林斯如柱式教科书，拱券结构如骨骼支撑，为罗马工程与娱乐文化的纪念碑。
pictures.full_text_en: The Pantheon in Rome, with a dome spanning 43 meters like a canopy of heaven. The 9-meter oculus at its apex pours down celestial light like the eye of heaven. The concrete dome forms a perfect sphere like the cosmos—the pinnacle of Roman architectural engineering, standing for nearly two thousand years.

pictures.title: 罗马卡拉卡拉浴场
pictures.summary: 罗马卡拉卡拉浴场如城市中的宫殿，拱顶大厅热水温水冷水浴池依次...
pictures.full_text: 罗马卡拉卡拉浴场如城市中的宫殿，拱顶大厅热水温水冷水浴池依次排列，马赛克地面大理石墙面如奢华宫殿，为罗马公共建筑与工程技术的集大成。
pictures.full_text_en: The Baths of Caracalla in Rome covered 11 hectares and could accommodate 1,600 bathers simultaneously. Vaulted structures supported the massive frigidarium ceiling, while underground furnaces and pipe systems heated pools of varying temperatures. The complex included libraries and gymnasiums—a monument to Roman engineering and public life.

pictures.title: 罗马高架引水渠
pictures.summary: 法国尼姆加尔桥三层拱券横跨河谷，最高四十九米如石虹飞架，以精...
pictures.full_text: 法国尼姆加尔桥三层拱券横跨河谷，最高四十九米如石虹飞架，以精确坡度引水五十公里，如巨人的数学游戏，为罗马工程实用与壮美的完美结合。
pictures.full_text_en: The Baths of Caracalla in Rome were like a palace within the city. Vaulted halls housed hot, warm, and cold baths in sequence, with mosaic floors and marble walls like a luxurious palace—the culmination of Roman public architecture and engineering.

pictures.title: 长城八达岭
pictures.summary: 中国长城横亘北方山脉如巨龙蜿蜒，八达岭段以砖石砌筑敌楼烽火台...
pictures.full_text: 中国长城横亘北方山脉如巨龙蜿蜒，八达岭段以砖石砌筑敌楼烽火台间隔分布，依山就势高低起伏，绵延万里为人类最大建筑工程，为中华文明的精神象征。
pictures.full_text_en: The Pont du Gard near Nîmes, France, spans the river valley with three tiers of arches, rising 49 meters like a stone rainbow. With a precise gradient, it carried water over 50 kilometers—like a giant's mathematical game, a perfect union of Roman engineering utility and grandeur.

pictures.title: 佛光寺东大殿
pictures.summary: 山西五台佛光寺东大殿为现存最大唐代木构，面阔七间单檐庑殿顶，...
pictures.full_text: 山西五台佛光寺东大殿为现存最大唐代木构，面阔七间单檐庑殿顶，斗拱硕大出檐深远如大鹏展翅，梁思成誉为中国第一国宝，为唐代建筑的活化石。
pictures.full_text_en: China's Great Wall stretches across northern mountains like a winding dragon. The Badaling section is built of brick and stone, with watchtowers and beacon towers spaced at intervals, rising and falling with the terrain. Stretching ten thousand li, it is humanity's largest construction project and the spiritual symbol of Chinese civilization.

pictures.title: 南禅寺大殿
pictures.summary: 山西五台南禅寺大殿为现存最早唐代木构，建中三年重建，面阔三间...
pictures.full_text: 山西五台南禅寺大殿为现存最早唐代木构，建中三年重建，面阔三间进深三间，单檐歇山顶如唐风犹存，为研究唐代建筑最珍贵的实物。
pictures.full_text_en: The Hanyuan Hall of Daming Palace in Chang'an was built on Longshou Ridge. Its three-tiered platform rose like a celestial staircase, with the Dragon Tail Way winding upward. Thirteen bays wide, it was the most magnificent palace building of the Tang dynasty, where envoys from all nations came to pay tribute.

pictures.title: 吴哥窟
pictures.summary: 柬埔寨吴哥窟为世界最大宗教建筑群，五座莲花塔如须弥山耸立于三...
pictures.full_text: 柬埔寨吴哥窟为世界最大宗教建筑群，五座莲花塔如须弥山耸立于三层回廊之上，浮雕绵延八百米如石头史诗，护城河如宇宙之海环绕，为高棉文明的巅峰。
pictures.full_text_en: The East Hall of Foguang Temple on Mount Wutai in Shanxi is the largest surviving Tang dynasty wooden structure. Seven bays wide with a single-eave hipped roof, its massive bracket sets and deep overhanging eaves resemble a great bird spreading its wings. Liang Sicheng hailed it as China's foremost national treasure, a living fossil of Tang architecture.

pictures.title: 婆罗浮屠
pictures.summary: 印度尼西亚婆罗浮屠如一座石头曼陀罗，九层平台如修行阶梯，两千...
pictures.full_text: 印度尼西亚婆罗浮屠如一座石头曼陀罗，九层平台如修行阶梯，两千六百块浮雕与五百尊佛像如佛法百科全书，从欲界到色界到无色界拾级而上抵达觉悟。
pictures.full_text_en: The Main Hall of Nanchan Temple on Mount Wutai in Shanxi is the earliest surviving Tang dynasty wooden structure, rebuilt in the third year of Jianzhong. Three bays wide and three bays deep, with a single-eave gabled roof, it preserves the Tang style—the most precious physical evidence for studying Tang architecture.

pictures.title: 雅典风塔
pictures.summary: 雅典罗马市场风塔为八角形建筑，八面浮雕各代表一种风向，顶部风...
pictures.full_text: 雅典罗马市场风塔为八角形建筑，八面浮雕各代表一种风向，顶部风向标如水手指南，内置水钟如时间机器，为古希腊科学与建筑的精巧结合。
pictures.full_text_en: The Bayon Temple at the center of Angkor Thom in Cambodia features 54 towers with four faces each—216 smiling countenances gazing in all directions. Each face is about two meters high, with slightly upturned lips, serene and mysterious, known as the Smile of the Khmer. The Bayon is Jayavarman VII's spiritual universe, a perfect unity of compassion and majesty.

pictures.title: 佩特拉古城
pictures.summary: 约旦佩特拉古城以玫瑰红砂岩凿出，卡兹尼神殿立面如罗马神庙嵌入...
pictures.full_text: 约旦佩特拉古城以玫瑰红砂岩凿出，卡兹尼神殿立面如罗马神庙嵌入岩壁，科林斯柱廊与精美雕刻在峡谷尽头如幻境浮现，为纳巴泰文明的岩石奇迹。
pictures.full_text_en: Over two thousand stupas and temples stand on the Bagan plains of Myanmar, built during the Bagan dynasty from the 11th to 13th centuries. The Shwezigon Pagoda gleams with gold, the Ananda Temple is deep as a cave. Hot air balloons rise at sunrise to overlook the temple forest like a chessboard—Bagan is Southeast Asia's most spectacular Buddhist architectural complex.

pictures.title: 圣索菲亚大教堂
pictures.summary: 拜占庭圣索菲亚大教堂穹顶直径三十二米如天幕悬浮，帆拱将圆顶过...
pictures.full_text: 拜占庭圣索菲亚大教堂穹顶直径三十二米如天幕悬浮，帆拱将圆顶过渡至方形空间如奇迹，四十道窗如光环漂浮，为东正教建筑巅峰，影响千年教堂设计。
pictures.title_en: Tower of the Winds in Athens
pictures.full_text_en: The Tower of the Winds in the Roman Agora of Athens is an octagonal building. Relief sculptures on each of the eight faces represent a different wind direction, with a weather vane on top like a sailor's guide. Its internal water clock functioned like a time machine—an exquisite combination of ancient Greek science and architecture.

pictures.title: 威尼斯圣马可教堂
pictures.summary: 威尼斯圣马可教堂五穹顶如东方皇冠，金色马赛克覆盖穹顶如天堂之...
pictures.full_text: 威尼斯圣马可教堂五穹顶如东方皇冠，金色马赛克覆盖穹顶如天堂之光，四匹青铜战马守卫入口如帝国荣耀，融合拜占庭与哥特风格，为威尼斯共和国的象征。
pictures.full_text_en: Scattered across the eastern desert of Jordan are Umayyad desert palaces. The frescoes at Qusayr Amra depict hunters and star maps. The zodiac on the bathhouse dome is a rare example of figurative painting in Islamic art. These desert castles served as the caliphs' summer retreats and political strongholds.

pictures.title: 沙特尔大教堂
pictures.summary: 法国沙特尔大教堂以一百七十六扇彩色玻璃窗如宝石镶嵌，蓝色圣母...
pictures.full_text: 法国沙特尔大教堂以一百七十六扇彩色玻璃窗如宝石镶嵌，蓝色圣母窗如深海般神秘，双塔一高一矮如不对称的和谐，为哥特建筑最完整的视觉圣经。
pictures.full_text_en: The dome of the Byzantine Hagia Sophia, 32 meters in diameter, hovers like a suspended canopy. Pendentives transition the circular dome to the square space like a miracle. Forty windows create the illusion of a floating halo—the pinnacle of Orthodox architecture, influencing church design for a millennium.

pictures.title: 科隆大教堂
pictures.summary: 德国科隆大教堂双塔高一百五十七米如双剑刺天，垂直线条如森林般...
pictures.full_text: 德国科隆大教堂双塔高一百五十七米如双剑刺天，垂直线条如森林般向上涌去，历时六百余年完工如信仰的马拉松，为哥特建筑最极致的垂直宣言。
pictures.full_text_en: St. Mark's Basilica in Venice, with its five domes like an Eastern crown. Golden mosaics cover the domes like the light of paradise, and four bronze horses guard the entrance like imperial glory. Fusing Byzantine and Gothic styles, it is the symbol of the Venetian Republic.

pictures.title: 米兰大教堂
pictures.summary: 米兰大教堂如白色大理石森林，三千余座雕像如石化的朝圣者布满屋...
pictures.full_text: 米兰大教堂如白色大理石森林，三千余座雕像如石化的朝圣者布满屋顶，一百三十五个尖塔如石笋如火焰如刺向天际的祈祷，为哥特建筑最华丽的变奏。
pictures.full_text_en: The 176 stained glass windows of Chartres Cathedral in France are like an illustrated Bible. The blue Virgin window gleams like the deep sea in sunlight. The two towers differ in style—Romanesque and Gothic standing side by side like a dialogue between two eras. Chartres is the most complete specimen of Gothic architecture; the French call it the Queen of Cathedrals.

pictures.title: 比萨大教堂建筑群
pictures.summary: 比萨奇迹广场上大教堂洗礼堂钟楼斜塔如三位一体，白色大理石如雪...
pictures.full_text: 比萨奇迹广场上大教堂洗礼堂钟楼斜塔如三位一体，白色大理石如雪如象牙，罗马式拱廊与伊斯兰拱窗如地中海文明交汇，斜塔因地基不均而举世闻名。
pictures.full_text_en: Chartres Cathedral in France features 176 stained glass windows set like gemstones. The blue Virgin window is as mysterious as the deep sea, and the asymmetrical twin towers create a harmonious imbalance—the most complete visual Bible of Gothic architecture.

pictures.title: 阿尔罕布拉宫
pictures.summary: 西班牙格拉纳达阿尔罕布拉宫如伊斯兰天堂，钟乳石状穹顶如星空倒...
pictures.full_text: 西班牙格拉纳达阿尔罕布拉宫如伊斯兰天堂，钟乳石状穹顶如星空倒映，阿拉伯书法与几何纹样如无限循环，狮子庭院喷泉如伊甸园之泉，为伊斯兰建筑在西方的绝唱。
pictures.full_text_en: The spire of Ulm Minster in Germany reaches 161 meters, the tallest church tower in the world. 768 steps spiral upward; from the top, one can overlook the Danube and the Black Forest. The Gothic spire pierces the sky like a sword—the ultimate pursuit of height by medieval architectural technology.

pictures.title: 天坛祈年殿
pictures.summary: 北京天坛祈年殿三重蓝色圆檐如天穹层叠，二十八根楠木柱如天地之...
pictures.full_text: 北京天坛祈年殿三重蓝色圆檐如天穹层叠，二十八根楠木柱如天地之数，无梁无钉如榫卯奇迹，圆形平面如天圆地方的宇宙模型，为中国建筑的精神象征。
pictures.full_text_en: Milan Cathedral is like a forest of white marble. Over 3,000 statues like petrified pilgrims cover the roof, and 135 pinnacles rise like stalagmites, like flames, like prayers thrust toward heaven—the most ornate variation of Gothic architecture.

pictures.title: 布达拉宫
pictures.summary: 拉萨布达拉宫依红山而建如从岩壁中生长，红宫白宫如政教合一的象...
pictures.full_text: 拉萨布达拉宫依红山而建如从岩壁中生长，红宫白宫如政教合一的象征，十三层高一百十七米如通天之塔，金顶在阳光下如佛光普照，为藏式建筑的巅峰。
pictures.full_text_en: On the Piazza dei Miracoli in Pisa, the cathedral, baptistery, and leaning campanile stand like a trinity. White marble gleams like snow and ivory, Romanesque arcades and Islamic-influenced arches reflect the convergence of Mediterranean civilizations. The Leaning Tower is world-famous for its uneven foundation.

pictures.title: 山西应县木塔
pictures.summary: 山西应县佛宫寺释迦塔为世界最高最古木塔，高六十七米九层五檐如...
pictures.full_text: 山西应县佛宫寺释迦塔为世界最高最古木塔，高六十七米九层五檐如擎天之柱，全塔无一根铁钉以斗拱五十四种如榫卯积木，历经千年地震不倒为木构奇迹。
pictures.full_text_en: The prayer hall of the Great Mosque of Córdoba in Spain features 856 red-and-white horseshoe arches like a palm forest. Double-tiered arches expand the spatial height. The Byzantine mosaics of the mihrab gleam with gold. A Catholic cathedral embedded within the mosque is like the superimposition of two civilizations—the most awe-inspiring building in Andalusia.

pictures.title: 苏州拙政园
pictures.summary: 苏州拙政园以水为中心如江南山水画卷，远香堂临水而筑如画中观景...
pictures.full_text: 苏州拙政园以水为中心如江南山水画卷，远香堂临水而筑如画中观景，亭台楼阁错落有致如诗如画，借景北寺塔如园外之景入园中，为中国园林艺术的典范。
pictures.title_en: Hall of Supreme Harmony, Forbidden City
pictures.full_text_en: The Hall of Supreme Harmony in Beijing's Forbidden City is the world's largest wooden palace. On a three-tier white marble platform, its yellow-glazed double-eave hipped roof resembles a golden crown. Six gold-coiled dragon columns inside support the structure like pillars of heaven—the supreme spatial symbol of imperial power.

pictures.title: 日本金阁寺
pictures.summary: 京都金阁寺三层楼阁贴金箔如黄金浮于镜湖池上，一层贵族风格二层...
pictures.full_text: 京都金阁寺三层楼阁贴金箔如黄金浮于镜湖池上，一层贵族风格二层武家风格三层禅宗风格如日本建筑史缩影，倒映水中如双份辉煌，为日本美学的极致。
pictures.title_en: Hall of Supreme Harmony, Palace Museum
pictures.full_text_en: The Hall of Supreme Harmony in Beijing's Forbidden City spans eleven bays wide and five bays deep, the largest surviving wooden hall in China. On its three-tier white marble platform, gold dragon imperial paintings dazzle brilliantly, and six gold-coiled dragon columns surround the throne. The Hall of Supreme Harmony is the supreme symbol of imperial power, the pinnacle of Chinese palace architecture.

pictures.title: 日本姬路城
pictures.summary: 日本姬路城白墙如白鹭展翅故称白鹭城，天守阁层层递减如叠塔如军...
pictures.full_text: 日本姬路城白墙如白鹭展翅故称白鹭城，天守阁层层递减如叠塔如军事要塞与美学宣言，迷宫般通道与射击孔如防御智慧，为日本城堡建筑的巅峰。
pictures.full_text_en: Beijing's Yonghe Temple was converted from Emperor Yongzheng's pre-ascension residence into a Tibetan Buddhist monastery. The 18-meter-tall standing Maitreya carved from white sandalwood in the Pavilion of Ten Thousand Happinesses is majestic and solemn. Han and Tibetan architectural styles merge, with glazed tiles and prayer flags coexisting. Yonghe Temple is the architectural embodiment of Qing dynasty ethnic policy and Beijing's most magnificent Tibetan Buddhist monastery.

pictures.title: 印度泰姬陵
pictures.summary: 莫卧儿皇帝沙贾汗为亡妻建泰姬陵，白色大理石如凝固的泪珠，四座...
pictures.full_text: 莫卧儿皇帝沙贾汗为亡妻建泰姬陵，白色大理石如凝固的泪珠，四座宣礼塔如守卫如烛台，水池倒映如双倍哀思，融合伊斯兰波斯印度风格，为爱情建筑的永恒丰碑。
pictures.full_text_en: The Sakyamuni Pagoda of Fogong Temple in Yingxian, Shanxi, is the world's tallest and oldest wooden pagoda. Rising 67 meters with nine stories and five eaves like a pillar supporting heaven, the entire structure uses not a single iron nail—54 types of bracket sets interlock like mortise-and-tenon blocks. Surviving a thousand years of earthquakes, it is a miracle of wooden construction.

pictures.title: 伊斯坦布尔蓝色清真寺
pictures.summary: 伊斯坦布尔苏丹艾哈迈德清真寺六座宣礼塔如六指指向天际，内部两...
pictures.full_text: 伊斯坦布尔苏丹艾哈迈德清真寺六座宣礼塔如六指指向天际，内部两万余块蓝色伊兹尼克瓷砖如蓝色星空，为奥斯曼帝国最辉煌的清真寺，与圣索菲亚隔广场相望。
pictures.full_text_en: Suzhou's Humble Administrator's Garden centers on water like a Jiangnan landscape scroll. The Distant Fragrance Hall sits by the water like a viewing pavilion within a painting. Pavilions and towers are arranged with poetic grace. Borrowed scenery from the North Temple Pagoda brings the outside into the garden—a paradigm of Chinese garden art.

pictures.title: 克里姆林宫
pictures.summary: 莫斯科克里姆林宫如俄罗斯的心脏，红墙如血如铁围合宫殿教堂广场...
pictures.full_text: 莫斯科克里姆林宫如俄罗斯的心脏，红墙如血如铁围合宫殿教堂广场，伊凡钟楼如灯塔如守卫，洋葱头穹顶如彩色火焰如东正教的视觉宣言，为俄罗斯权力的永恒象征。
pictures.full_text_en: Kyoto's Kinkaku-ji, a three-story pavilion covered in gold leaf, floats on the Mirror Pond like solid gold. The first floor in aristocratic style, the second in samurai style, and the third in Zen style form a microcosm of Japanese architectural history. Reflected in the water, its brilliance is doubled—the ultimate expression of Japanese aesthetics.

pictures.title: 西敏寺
pictures.summary: 伦敦西敏寺为英国哥特建筑杰作，历代国王加冕与安葬于此如国家祠...
pictures.full_text: 伦敦西敏寺为英国哥特建筑杰作，历代国王加冕与安葬于此如国家祠堂，扇形穹顶如石花绽放如天国花园，诗人角如文学圣殿，为英国历史与信仰的建筑缩影。
pictures.full_text_en: Himeji Castle in Japan, its white walls spreading like a white heron's wings, is called the White Egret Castle. The keep diminishes in successive tiers like stacked towers—both military fortress and aesthetic declaration. Maze-like passages and loopholes embody defensive wisdom—the pinnacle of Japanese castle architecture.

pictures.title: 巴黎圣礼拜堂
pictures.summary: 巴黎圣礼拜堂如石头框架中的彩色玻璃，十五扇高十五米的彩窗如光...
pictures.full_text: 巴黎圣礼拜堂如石头框架中的彩色玻璃，十五扇高十五米的彩窗如光之墙壁如圣经故事如宝石瀑布，上部教堂几无石墙全为玻璃，为哥特建筑光之神秘主义极致。
pictures.full_text_en: Mughal emperor Shah Jahan built the Taj Mahal for his deceased wife. White marble like frozen teardrops, four minarets like sentinels or candlestands, the reflecting pool doubling the grief—fusing Islamic, Persian, and Indian styles, it is an eternal monument to love in architecture.

pictures.title: 水晶宫
pictures.summary: 英国为1851年世博会建水晶宫，铸铁与玻璃如巨型温室如水晶宫...
pictures.full_text: 英国为1851年世博会建水晶宫，铸铁与玻璃如巨型温室如水晶宫殿，长五百六十四米如钢铁与光的宣言，预制构件快速装配如工业革命的速度，为现代建筑先声。
pictures.full_text_en: The Sultan Ahmed Mosque in Istanbul has six minarets like six fingers pointing to the sky. Over 20,000 blue İznik tiles inside create a blue starry sky—the most splendid mosque of the Ottoman Empire, facing Hagia Sophia across the square.

pictures.title: 芝加哥家庭保险公司大楼
pictures.summary: 芝加哥家庭保险公司大楼为世界首栋高层钢结构建筑，十层如摩天楼...
pictures.full_text: 芝加哥家庭保险公司大楼为世界首栋高层钢结构建筑，十层如摩天楼的婴儿，以钢框架承重解放墙体如骨架与皮肤分离，为摩天大楼的始祖，开启垂直城市的时代。
pictures.full_text_en: St. Basil's Cathedral on Moscow's Red Square has nine colorful onion domes rising like flames or stacked like candies, each different in shape and color like a fairy-tale castle. Ivan the Terrible built it to commemorate the conquest of Kazan. Legend says he blinded the architect to prevent him from building anything equally beautiful—the iconic symbol of Russian architecture.

pictures.title: 高迪圣家族大教堂
pictures.summary: 巴塞罗那圣家族大教堂如从大地生长的石头森林，柱如树干分叉支撑...
pictures.full_text: 巴塞罗那圣家族大教堂如从大地生长的石头森林，柱如树干分叉支撑穹顶如林冠，彩色玻璃如热带水果般绚烂，高迪以自然为师将哥特推向有机形态，百年未竣如永恒的建造。
pictures.full_text_en: Westminster Abbey in London is a masterpiece of English Gothic architecture. Kings have been crowned and buried here like a national shrine. Fan vaulting blooms like stone flowers like a heavenly garden. Poets' Corner is like a literary sanctuary—an architectural microcosm of British history and faith.

pictures.title: 高迪巴特罗之家
pictures.summary: 高迪改造巴特罗公寓如海洋梦境，波浪形阳台如面具如海浪，屋顶如...
pictures.full_text: 高迪改造巴特罗公寓如海洋梦境，波浪形阳台如面具如海浪，屋顶如龙脊如鳞片如圣乔治屠龙，碎瓷拼贴如海底珊瑚，将建筑变为可居住的雕塑。
pictures.full_text_en: Sainte-Chapelle in Paris is like stained glass within a stone frame. Fifteen windows rising 15 meters high form walls of light, biblical stories, and cascades of gems. The upper chapel has almost no stone walls—only glass—the ultimate expression of Gothic light mysticism.

pictures.title: 赖特流水别墅
pictures.summary: 美国建筑师赖特于宾州山林溪流之上建住宅，悬臂露台如岩石延伸如...
pictures.full_text: 美国建筑师赖特于宾州山林溪流之上建住宅，悬臂露台如岩石延伸如瀑布的一部分，混凝土与砂岩如自然生长，将建筑与风景融为一体，为有机建筑的宣言。
pictures.full_text_en: Britain built the Crystal Palace for the 1851 Great Exhibition. Cast iron and glass formed a giant greenhouse, a crystal palace 564 meters long—a manifesto of steel and light. Prefabricated components were rapidly assembled at the speed of the Industrial Revolution, heralding modern architecture.

pictures.title: 赖特古根海姆博物馆
pictures.summary: 纽约古根海姆博物馆如白色螺旋如海螺如倒置巴别塔，坡道盘旋而上...
pictures.full_text: 纽约古根海姆博物馆如白色螺旋如海螺如倒置巴别塔，坡道盘旋而上如观展如漫步如冥想，将线性展厅变为连续流动空间，为博物馆建筑的空间革命。
pictures.full_text_en: The Home Insurance Building in Chicago was the world's first tall steel-frame building. Ten stories like the infancy of the skyscraper, its steel load-bearing frame liberated the walls—separating skeleton from skin. The ancestor of the skyscraper, it inaugurated the era of the vertical city.

pictures.title: 柯布西耶萨伏伊别墅
pictures.summary: 柯布西耶于巴黎近郊建白色方盒如机器如诗，底层架空如悬浮如飞行...
pictures.full_text: 柯布西耶于巴黎近郊建白色方盒如机器如诗，底层架空如悬浮如飞行员视角，屋顶花园如归还大地，自由平面自由立面如新建筑五点的宣言，为现代主义建筑的圣经。
pictures.full_text_en: Barcelona's Sagrada Família grows like a stone forest from the earth. Columns branch like tree trunks to support the vault like a forest canopy. Stained glass blazes like tropical fruit. Gaudí, taking nature as his master, pushed Gothic toward organic form. Unfinished after a century, it is like eternal construction.

pictures.title: 密斯凡德罗巴塞罗那馆
pictures.summary: 密斯为1929年巴塞罗那世博建德国馆，十字形钢柱支撑平屋顶如...
pictures.full_text: 密斯为1929年巴塞罗那世博建德国馆，十字形钢柱支撑平屋顶如漂浮如天篷，缟玛瑙与大理石隔墙如自由滑移如空间流动，少即是多的极简宣言，为现代主义空间诗学。
pictures.full_text_en: Gaudí transformed the Batlló apartment into an oceanic dream. Wavy balconies like masks or waves, the roof like a dragon's spine, scales like Saint George slaying the dragon, broken-tile mosaics like undersea coral—architecture become inhabitable sculpture.

pictures.title: 密斯西格拉姆大厦
pictures.summary: 密斯于纽约建西格拉姆大厦，青铜与琥珀玻璃如绅士般矗立于广场之...
pictures.full_text: 密斯于纽约建西格拉姆大厦，青铜与琥珀玻璃如绅士般矗立于广场之后，退让街道如城市礼仪，结构外露如骨架如诚实，为摩天楼确立了优雅克制的标准。
pictures.full_text_en: American architect Wright built a house over a stream in the Pennsylvania woods. Cantilevered terraces extend like rock formations, like part of the waterfall. Concrete and sandstone seem to grow naturally, merging architecture and landscape—a manifesto of organic architecture.

pictures.title: 格罗皮乌斯包豪斯校舍
pictures.summary: 格罗皮乌斯于德绍建包豪斯校舍，玻璃幕墙如透明如民主如教学开放...
pictures.full_text: 格罗皮乌斯于德绍建包豪斯校舍，玻璃幕墙如透明如民主如教学开放，不对称布局如功能分区如现代理性，将艺术与技术统一，为现代设计教育的建筑宣言。
pictures.full_text_en: New York's Guggenheim Museum is a white spiral like a seashell, like an inverted Tower of Babel. The ramp spirals upward—viewing art like strolling, like meditating—transforming the linear gallery into a continuous flowing space, a spatial revolution in museum architecture.

pictures.title: 路易·康萨尔科浴室
pictures.summary: 美国建筑师康以混凝土立方体如废墟如神庙，方形开口如天窗如眼睛...
pictures.full_text: 美国建筑师康以混凝土立方体如废墟如神庙，方形开口如天窗如眼睛如框景，光线如访客般进入空间，以永恒的材料追问建筑何为，为现代建筑的哲学之问。
pictures.full_text_en: Le Corbusier built a white box in the Paris suburbs like a machine, like a poem. Pilotis raise it as if floating, like a pilot's perspective. A roof garden returns the ground, free plan and free facade like a manifesto of the Five Points of Architecture—the bible of modernist architecture.

pictures.title: 路易·康孟加拉达卡国会
pictures.summary: 康为孟加拉设计国会大厦如红砖城堡如现代神庙，巨大几何开口如天...
pictures.full_text: 康为孟加拉设计国会大厦如红砖城堡如现代神庙，巨大几何开口如天窗如洞口如光之通道，雨水沿建筑流淌如仪式，为发展中国家创造民主与尊严的建筑象征。
pictures.full_text_en: Le Corbusier built the chapel at Ronchamp on a French hillside like a sculpture, like hands in prayer. Thick white walls like sails or a nun's coif, colored window openings like stars or wounds admitting light—like a cave, like a sanctuary—the most poetic religious space of modernism.

pictures.title: 贝聿铭卢浮宫金字塔
pictures.summary: 华裔建筑师贝聿铭于卢浮宫庭院建玻璃金字塔如钻石如冰晶，钢结构...
pictures.full_text: 华裔建筑师贝聿铭于卢浮宫庭院建玻璃金字塔如钻石如冰晶，钢结构与玻璃如透明如轻盈如古典宫殿的现代入口，争议之后成为巴黎新地标，为传统与现代的对话典范。
pictures.title_en: Mies van der Rohe's Barcelona Pavilion
pictures.full_text_en: Mies built the German Pavilion for the 1929 Barcelona Exposition. Cruciform steel columns support a flat roof floating like a canopy. Onyx and marble partitions slide freely as space flows—"less is more," a minimalist manifesto, the spatial poetics of modernism.

pictures.title: 贝聿铭苏州博物馆
pictures.summary: 贝聿铭为故乡设计苏州博物馆，白墙灰顶如水墨如江南，几何片石如...
pictures.full_text: 贝聿铭为故乡设计苏州博物馆，白墙灰顶如水墨如江南，几何片石如假山如米芾云山，光影如诗如画如园林，将传统苏州美学转译为现代建筑语言。
pictures.full_text_en: Mies built the Seagram Building in New York. Bronze and amber glass stand like a gentleman set back from the street behind a plaza—yielding to the street like urban etiquette, structure exposed like a skeleton like honesty—establishing a standard of elegant restraint for skyscrapers.

pictures.title: 安藤忠雄光之教堂
pictures.summary: 日本建筑师安藤忠雄于大阪建清水混凝土教堂，十字形缝隙如光的十...
pictures.full_text: 日本建筑师安藤忠雄于大阪建清水混凝土教堂，十字形缝隙如光的十字如信仰如希望，素混凝土如修士般克制如苦行，以最少材料抵达最深的精神性。
pictures.full_text_en: Gropius built the Bauhaus building in Dessau. Glass curtain walls like transparency, like democracy, like open teaching. Asymmetric layout like functional zoning, like modern rationality. Unifying art and technology—an architectural manifesto for modern design education.

pictures.title: 安藤忠雄直岛地中美术馆
pictures.summary: 安藤忠雄于直岛地下建美术馆如洞穴如冥想，混凝土如容器如空间如...
pictures.full_text: 安藤忠雄于直岛地下建美术馆如洞穴如冥想，混凝土如容器如空间如光之通道，莫奈睡莲厅如天光如水面如永恒，将建筑消隐于大地如与自然合一。
pictures.full_text_en: Finnish architect Aalto designed a tuberculosis sanatorium. Patient rooms face south like chasing light, like healing. Rounded handrails like care, like gentleness. Colors like Nordic forests like psychological comfort—infusing functionalism with human warmth, a pioneer of humanistic architecture.

pictures.title: 盖里毕尔巴鄂古根海姆
pictures.summary: 美国建筑师盖里于西班牙毕尔巴鄂以钛合金曲面如鱼如船如花如火焰...
pictures.full_text: 美国建筑师盖里于西班牙毕尔巴鄂以钛合金曲面如鱼如船如花如火焰，如数字时代的巴洛克如雕塑般的建筑，以一栋建筑拯救一座城市，为解构主义的奇迹。
pictures.full_text_en: American architect Kahn used concrete cubes like ruins, like temples. Square openings like skylights, like eyes, like framed views. Light enters the space like a visitor. With timeless materials he asked what architecture is—the philosophical question of modern architecture.

pictures.title: 盖里迪士尼音乐厅
pictures.summary: 盖里于洛杉矶设计音乐厅如不锈钢如风帆如花瓣如音符凝固，曲面如...
pictures.full_text: 盖里于洛杉矶设计音乐厅如不锈钢如风帆如花瓣如音符凝固，曲面如声波如旋律如洛杉矶的阳光反射，为解构主义最优雅的变奏，如可居住的雕塑。
pictures.title_en: Louis Kahn's National Assembly of Bangladesh
pictures.full_text_en: Kahn designed the National Assembly building for Bangladesh like a red-brick fortress, like a modern temple. Massive geometric openings like skylights, like portals, like channels of light. Rainwater flows down the building like ritual—creating an architectural symbol of democracy and dignity for a developing nation.

pictures.title: 扎哈广州歌剧院
pictures.summary: 伊拉克裔英国建筑师扎哈于广州设计歌剧院如砾石如流水如外星基地...
pictures.full_text: 伊拉克裔英国建筑师扎哈于广州设计歌剧院如砾石如流水如外星基地，混凝土曲面如地质如侵蚀如数字生成的有机形态，为参数化设计在中国的标志性实践。
pictures.full_text_en: Chinese-American architect I.M. Pei built a glass pyramid in the Louvre courtyard like a diamond, like an ice crystal. Steel and glass—transparent, lightweight—a modern entrance to a classical palace. After controversy, it became a new Paris landmark, a paradigm of dialogue between tradition and modernity.

pictures.title: 扎哈北京银河SOHO
pictures.summary: 扎哈于北京设计银河SOHO如太空站如流体如未来城市，连续曲面...
pictures.full_text: 扎哈于北京设计银河SOHO如太空站如流体如未来城市，连续曲面如丝带如漩涡如无棱角的世界，中庭如峡谷如城市峡谷如流动的公共空间，为参数化美学的都市宣言。
pictures.full_text_en: I.M. Pei designed the Suzhou Museum for his hometown. White walls and gray roofs like ink wash, like Jiangnan. Geometric stone slices like rockeries, like Mi Fu's cloud mountains. Light and shadow like poetry, like painting, like gardens—translating traditional Suzhou aesthetics into modern architectural language.

pictures.title: 库哈斯央视大楼
pictures.summary: 荷兰建筑师库哈斯设计央视总部如悬臂如环如莫比乌斯如不可能的结...
pictures.full_text: 荷兰建筑师库哈斯设计央视总部如悬臂如环如莫比乌斯如不可能的结构，两塔倾斜相接如门如环如城市的巨门，为解构主义在北京的纪念碑式宣言。
pictures.title_en: Tadao Ando's Church of the Light
pictures.full_text_en: Japanese architect Tadao Ando built a church of exposed concrete in Osaka. A cross-shaped slit like a cross of light, like faith, like hope. Bare concrete restrained like a monk, like asceticism—reaching the deepest spirituality with the fewest materials.

pictures.title: 赫尔佐格鸟巢
pictures.summary: 瑞士建筑师赫尔佐格与德梅隆设计北京国家体育场如鸟巢如编织如混...
pictures.full_text: 瑞士建筑师赫尔佐格与德梅隆设计北京国家体育场如鸟巢如编织如混沌中的秩序，钢结构如树枝如血管如随机却有逻辑的编织，为奥运建筑最具辨识度的形态。
pictures.full_text_en: Tadao Ando built an underground museum on Naoshima like a cave, like meditation. Concrete like a vessel, like space, like a channel of light. The Monet Water Lilies room like skylight, like water's surface, like eternity—architecture dissolved into the earth, at one with nature.

pictures.title: 让·努维尔阿布扎比卢浮宫
pictures.summary: 法国建筑师努维尔于沙漠中建海上博物馆如漂浮如绿洲如阿拉伯之城...
pictures.full_text: 法国建筑师努维尔于沙漠中建海上博物馆如漂浮如绿洲如阿拉伯之城，巨大穹顶如棕榈叶如光之雨如阿拉伯几何纹样的光影过滤，为文化外交的建筑诗篇。
pictures.full_text_en: Paris's Centre Pompidou is like a building turned inside out. Colored pipes like blood vessels, bones exposed—blue for air conditioning, green for water, yellow for electricity, red for circulation—color-coded like organs, like machines, like subversion. A carnival manifesto of High-Tech architecture.

pictures.title: SANAA劳力士学习中心
pictures.summary: 日本建筑师妹岛和世与西泽立卫于洛桑建学习中心如地形如波浪如无...
pictures.full_text: 日本建筑师妹岛和世与西泽立卫于洛桑建学习中心如地形如波浪如无墙的世界，连续曲面如丘陵如没有边界的流动空间，为极简主义与自由空间的实验。
pictures.full_text_en: American architect Gehry built in Bilbao, Spain, with titanium curves like fish, like ships, like flowers, like flames—Baroque of the digital age, sculptural architecture. One building saved a city—a miracle of deconstructivism.

pictures.title: 隈研吾长城脚下的公社竹屋
pictures.summary: 日本建筑师隈研吾于长城脚下建竹屋如竹林如透明如消隐，竹条如帘...
pictures.full_text: 日本建筑师隈研吾于长城脚下建竹屋如竹林如透明如消隐，竹条如帘如屏如呼吸如与山林的对话，将建筑消融于自然如负建筑如谦逊的存在。
pictures.full_text_en: Gehry designed a concert hall in Los Angeles like stainless steel, like sails, like petals, like frozen musical notes. Curved surfaces like sound waves, like melodies, reflecting Los Angeles sunshine—the most elegant variation of deconstructivism, like an inhabitable sculpture.

pictures.title: 王澍宁波博物馆
pictures.summary: 中国建筑师王澍以拆迁废料瓦爿墙砌筑宁波博物馆如废墟如记忆如山...
pictures.full_text: 中国建筑师王澍以拆迁废料瓦爿墙砌筑宁波博物馆如废墟如记忆如山水，旧砖碎瓦如时间的化石如城市的记忆层，为普利兹克奖中国首获者的代表作品。
pictures.full_text_en: Iraqi-British architect Zaha Hadid designed the Guangzhou Opera House like gravel, like flowing water, like an alien base. Concrete curves like geology, like erosion, like digitally generated organic forms—a landmark practice of parametric design in China.

pictures.title: 王澍中国美术学院象山校区
pictures.summary: 王澍设计杭州象山校区如山水如村落如文人园林，建筑如山如水如合...
pictures.full_text: 王澍设计杭州象山校区如山水如村落如文人园林，建筑如山如水如合院如天井如瓦爿墙如旧材新用，将传统建造智慧与当代空间体验融合，为批判性地域主义的实践。
pictures.full_text_en: Zaha Hadid designed Galaxy SOHO in Beijing like a space station, like fluid, like a future city. Continuous curves like ribbons, like vortexes, like a world without corners. Atriums like canyons, like urban gorges, like flowing public space—an urban manifesto of parametric aesthetics.

pictures.title: 伊东丰雄仙台媒体中心
pictures.summary: 日本建筑师伊东丰雄设计仙台媒体中心如海藻如森林如透明如流动，...
pictures.full_text: 日本建筑师伊东丰雄设计仙台媒体中心如海藻如森林如透明如流动，十三根管状柱如树如海藻如信息流如自由穿越，为信息时代的建筑如流动如轻盈如媒体。
pictures.full_text_en: Dutch architect Koolhaas designed the CCTV headquarters like a cantilever, like a loop, like a Möbius strip, like an impossible structure. Two towers lean and join like a gate, like a ring, like a giant gate of the city—a monumental manifesto of deconstructivism in Beijing.

pictures.title: BIG哥本哈根CopenHill
pictures.summary: 丹麦建筑事务所BIG设计垃圾焚烧发电厂屋顶滑雪场如山如游乐如...
pictures.full_text: 丹麦建筑事务所BIG设计垃圾焚烧发电厂屋顶滑雪场如山如游乐如绿色如矛盾统一，烟圈如提醒如艺术如环保教育，以享乐主义包裹可持续性，为实用主义的乌托邦。
pictures.full_text_en: Swiss architects Herzog & de Meuron designed Beijing's National Stadium like a bird's nest, like weaving, like order within chaos. Steel structures like branches, like blood vessels, like random yet logical weaving—the most recognizable form of Olympic architecture.

pictures.title: 马岩松哈尔滨大剧院
pictures.summary: 中国建筑师马岩松设计哈尔滨大剧院如雪如风如银色如北国如飘带如...
pictures.full_text: 中国建筑师马岩松设计哈尔滨大剧院如雪如风如银色如北国如飘带如自然延伸，白色铝板如雪如冰如松花江的波浪如银色如未来如山水城市的宣言。
pictures.full_text_en: French architect Nouvel built a maritime museum in the desert like a floating oasis, like an Arab city. The vast dome like palm fronds, like rain of light, filtering light through Arab geometric patterns—an architectural poem of cultural diplomacy.

pictures.title: 上海中心大厦
pictures.summary: 上海中心大厦高六百三十二米如龙如螺旋如如削减风载如旋转如上升...
pictures.full_text: 上海中心大厦高六百三十二米如龙如螺旋如如削减风载如旋转如上升如中国第一高楼，双层幕墙如保温如呼吸如绿色如未来如垂直城市的宣言。
pictures.full_text_en: Japanese architects Sejima and Nishizawa built a learning center in Lausanne like terrain, like waves, like a world without walls. Continuous curved surfaces like hills, like flowing space without boundaries—an experiment in minimalism and free space.
